conversation.content:
Extract values for these columns. Document has 0 pages.

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: OS Rate (%) | Overall | Treatment
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the experimental arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 2: OS Rate (%) | Overall | Control
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the control arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 3: OS Rate (%) | Synchronous | Treatment
Definition: What percentage of patients with metastasis at the time of diagnosis (synchronous metastasis) in the experimental arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 4: OS Rate (%) | Synchronous | Control
Definition: What percentage of patients with metastasis at the time of diagnosis (synchronous metastasis) in the control arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 5: OS Rate (%) | Metachronous | Treatment
Definition: What percentage of patients with metastasis after diagnosis (metachronous metastasis) in the experimental arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 6: OS Rate (%) | Metachronous | Control
Definition: What percentage of patients with metastasis after diagnosis (metachronous metastasis) in the control arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 7: OS Rate (%) | High volume | Treatment
Definition: What percentage of patients with high volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the experimental arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 8: OS Rate (%) | High volume | Control
Definition: What percentage of patients with high volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the control arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 9: OS Rate (%) | Low volume | Treatment
Definition: What percentage of patients with low volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the experimental arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 10: OS Rate (%) | Low volume | Control
Definition: What percentage of patients with low volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the control arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.

For informational columns (trial name, arms, etc.), use get_chunks_by_page([1, 2]) first. For specific columns, use search_chunks. Submit when you have enough information.
